items.title_en: The summer box office is off to a hot start as weekend ticket sales top $160 million
items.title_zh: 夏季票房开局火爆，周末票房突破1.6亿美元
items.desc_en: The summer box office is off to a sizzling start, thanks in part to strong week-after-week performance from returning titles.
items.desc_zh: 夏季票房开局火爆，这在一定程度上要归功于回归影片一周又一周的强劲表现。

items.title_en: Credit card debt dips to $1.25 trillion — but maintains ‘K-shaped’ pattern, New York Fed research shows
items.title_zh: 纽约联储研究显示，信用卡债务降至 1.25 万亿美元，但仍保持“K 形”格局
items.desc_en: Collectively, Americans owe $1.25 trillion on their credit cards, according to a new report by the Federal Reserve Bank of New York.
items.desc_zh: 根据纽约联邦储备银行的一份新报告，美国人的信用卡欠款总计达 1.25 万亿美元。

items.title_en: Small investors are piling into this ETF at a record pace. What the frenzy is all about

items.desc_zh: 存储芯片短缺突然使得一只 ETF 成为散户交易者的首选。

items.title_en: Bulls and bears both believe this could be 1999 all over again. Embrace it or dump your tech stocks?
items.title_zh: 多头和空头都认为 1999 年可能会重演。拥抱它还是抛售你的科技股？
items.desc_en: We are not guaranteed a close rerun of the 1999-2000 extremes. Just because things got crazier then doesn't mean that's ahead of us.
items.desc_zh: 我们不能保证 1999 年至 2000 年的极端情况会重演。仅仅因为当时事情变得更加疯狂并不意味着我们就这样了。

items.title_en: Uganda's president sworn in for record seventh term

items.desc_zh: 许多分析师对这笔交易提出质疑，理由是 GameStop 将如何为交易提供资金以及战略理由。

items.title_zh: 冯德莱恩：欧盟需要推迟儿童使用社交媒体的时间
items.desc_en: She told an EU summit that an expert panel was due to come up with steps on how to protect minors online by July.
items.desc_zh: 她在一次欧盟峰会上表示，专家小组将于 7 月份就如何保护未成年人上网制定措施。

items.title_en: Mexico cancels plans to end school year early for World Cup
items.title_zh: 墨西哥取消为世界杯提前结束学年的计划
items.desc_en: Parents were angry at a proposal to end classes on 5 June instead of 15 July due to the tournament and expected extreme heat.
items.desc_zh: 家长们对因锦标赛而于 6 月 5 日而不是 7 月 15 日结束课程的提议感到愤怒，并且预计会出现极热天气。

items.title_en: Canvas hack: company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data

items.desc_en: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.
items.desc_zh: Canvas 背后的公司表示，它已经与扰乱数千所学院和大学的黑客“达成协议”。

items.desc_zh: 此次诉讼发生之际，人们对自动播放等向用户提供无尽内容的平台功能进行了越来越严格的审查。

items.desc_zh: 在让顾客迷上两天和次日送达后，亚马逊逐渐加快了送货时间。

items.desc_en: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

items.desc_zh: 凯尔·斯塔默爵士在周一的一次挑衅性演讲中承诺重建英国与欧洲的关系。

items.desc_zh: 虽然仅向部分 TikTok 用户推出，但该功能由人工智能生成的奇异描述却被广泛分享。

items.title_en: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today- what does this mean for your DMs?
items.title_zh: Instagram 隐私技术今天关闭 - 这对您的私信意味着什么？
items.desc_en: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.
items.desc_zh: 该平台表示将删除端到端加密消息，这是母公司 Meta 的一个重大转变。

items.desc_zh: 能够捕获热量的分子可能是一种有用的供暖脱碳技术。

items.title_zh: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees

items.desc_zh: Meta表示Ofcom的计算“不成比例”； the regulator said it would defend its position.

items.title_en: Watch: Drone delivers first Amazon parcels in UK

items.desc_en: The tech giant says it hopes to slowly expand the service as the demand for ultra-fast deliveries grows.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，随着对超快速交付的需求的增长，它希望慢慢扩大这项服务。

items.title_en: In 'Musk v Altman', this judge will make the final call
items.title_zh: 在“马斯克诉奥特曼”中，这位法官将做出最终决定

items.desc_zh: 这场不和加剧了两家科技巨头之间代价高昂的摊牌。

items.title_en: Former OpenAI board member says Elon Musk offered her sperm donations
items.title_zh: 前 OpenAI 董事会成员表示埃隆·马斯克愿意捐献她的精子
items.desc_en: Shivon Zilis is the mother of four of Musk's children. That relationship began as she advised OpenAI.
items.desc_zh: Shivon Zilis 是马斯克四个孩子的母亲。这种关系始于她为 OpenAI 提供建议时。

items.title_en: Robot wars - what an operation in Ukraine tells us about the battlefield of the near future

items.desc_zh: 在乌克兰总统泽伦斯基表示仅使用机器人和无人机就占领了领土之后，无人战争的未来是什么？
